name: MAC-10 | 炽热
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted to look as though it just came out of the forge. Make some outlines of your own
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，以让它看上去就像是刚刚锻造好的。 打造你的专属定制吧
